response.justification: Highly experienced full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years and a clear core in TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes. Strong software-craftsmanship signal (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) at re:cinq. Frontend depth leans more toward Ember than React, and Nest.js/Vitest are not explicitly evidenced, but the breadth, polyglot ability, and architecture experience map well to the role.
strengths: Deep, long-tenured full-stack experience with the core TS/Node.js + React + MongoDB + AWS/K8s stack
Direct AI-agent development experience (MCP generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Strong testing and engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, multiple languages
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience; frontend depth skews to Ember over React
Heavy DLang focus across much of the career may dilute relevance to the primary stack
Job-hopping signals and overlapping roles may warrant clarification on focus and recency of React work
